ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of carefully placing a star on top of a Christmas tree.  The robot will use both arms to perform this action.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the care taken in the task. The first frame shows both arms extended upward, preparing to place the star. The second frame depicts the left arm supporting the tree, while the right arm carefully positions the star. The third frame shows the star being placed on top of the tree. The final frame displays the robot admiring its handiwork, with arms gently resting at its sides.

frames.beat: both arms reach up, ready to place the star
left arm steadies the tree, right arm positions the star
the star is carefully placed on top
arms rest, admiring the festive tree
